authors_text: Yong Guo,Yaofo Chen,Mingkui Tan,Kui Jia,Jian Chen,Jingdong Wang
title: Content-Aware Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 内容感知卷积神经网络
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved great success due to the powerful feature learning ability of convolution layers. Specifically, the standard convolution traverses the input images/features using a sliding window scheme to extract features. However, not all the windows contribute equally to the prediction results of CNNs. In practice, the convolutional operation on some of the windows (e.g., smooth windows that contain very similar pixels) can be very redundant and may introduce noises into the computation. Such redundancy may not only deteriorate the performance but also incur the unnecessary computational cost. Thus, it is important to reduce the computational redundancy of convolution to improve the performance. To this end, we propose a Content-aware Convolution (CAC) that automatically detects the smooth windows and applies a 1x1 convolutional kernel to replace the original large kernel. In this sense, we are able to effectively avoid the redundant computation on similar pixels. By replacing the standard convolution in CNNs with our CAC, the resultant models yield significantly better performance and lower computational cost than the baseline models with the standard convolution. More critically, we are able to dynamically allocate suitable computation resources according to the data smoothness of different images, making it possible for content-aware computation. Extensive experiments on various computer vision tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing methods.

abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）由于卷积层强大的特征学习能力而取得了巨大的成功。具体来说，标准卷积使用滑动窗口方案遍历输入图像/特征来提取特征。然而，并非所有窗口对 CNN 的预测结果都有同等的贡献。实际上，某些窗口（例如，包含非常相似的像素的平滑窗口）上的卷积运算可能非常冗余，并且可能会在计算中引入噪声。这种冗余不仅会降低性能，还会带来不必要的计算成本。因此，减少卷积的计算冗余以提高性能非常重要。为此，我们提出了一种内容感知卷积（CAC），它自动检测平滑窗口并应用 1x1 卷积核来替换原来的大核。从这个意义上说，我们能够有效地避免对相似像素的冗余计算。通过用我们的 CAC 替换 CNN 中的标准卷积，所得模型比具有标准卷积的基线模型具有显着更好的性能和更低的计算成本。更关键的是，我们能够根据不同图像的数据平滑程度，动态分配合适的计算资源，使得内容感知计算成为可能。对各种计算机视觉任务的广泛实验证明了我们的方法相对于现有方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种内容感知卷积神经网络（CAC），通过减少卷积过程中的冗余计算来提升CNN的性能和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 标准卷积操作在处理平滑区域时会产生冗余计算，导致计算资源浪费和性能下降，亟需一种动态调整计算资源的方法以适应不同图像内容。
AI.method: 设计内容感知卷积（CAC），自动检测平滑窗口并用1x1卷积核替代原大核，根据图像平滑程度动态分配计算资源。
AI.result: 实验表明，CAC在多个计算机视觉任务中优于现有方法，显著提升性能并降低计算成本，实现了内容感知的动态计算。
AI.conclusion: 内容感知卷积有效减少了冗余计算，为高效适应不同图像内容的CNN提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yunsong Zhou,Yuan He,Hongzi Zhu,Cheng Wang,Hongyang Li,Qinhong Jiang
title: Monocular 3D Object Detection: An Extrinsic Parameter Free Approach
title_zh: 单目 3D 物体检测：一种无外部参数的方法
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection is an important task in autonomous driving. It can be easily intractable where there exists ego-car pose change w.r.t. ground plane. This is common due to the slight fluctuation of road smoothness and slope. Due to the lack of insight in industrial application, existing methods on open datasets neglect the camera pose information, which inevitably results in the detector being susceptible to camera extrinsic parameters. The perturbation of objects is very popular in most autonomous driving cases for industrial products. To this end, we propose a novel method to capture camera pose to formulate the detector free from extrinsic perturbation. Specifically, the proposed framework predicts camera extrinsic parameters by detecting vanishing point and horizon change. A converter is designed to rectify perturbative features in the latent space. By doing so, our 3D detector works independent of the extrinsic parameter variations and produces accurate results in realistic cases, e.g., potholed and uneven roads, where almost all existing monocular detectors fail to handle. Experiments demonstrate our method yields the best performance compared with the other state-of-the-arts by a large margin on both KITTI 3D and nuScenes datasets.

abstract_zh: 单目 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶中的一项重要任务。当存在自我汽车姿态变化时，它很容易变得棘手。地平面。由于道路平滑度和坡度的轻微波动，这种情况很常见。由于缺乏对工业应用的洞察，现有的开放数据集方法忽略了相机位姿信息，这不可避免地导致检测器容易受到相机外在参数的影响。在大多数工业产品的自动驾驶案例中，物体的扰动非常流行。为此，我们提出了一种捕获相机姿态的新颖方法，以制定不受外部扰动的检测器。具体来说，所提出的框架通过检测消失点和地平线变化来预测相机外在参数。转换器旨在纠正潜在空间中的扰动特征。通过这样做，我们的 3D 检测器的工作不受外部参数变化的影响，并在现实情况下产生准确的结果，例如坑洼不平和不平坦的道路，而几乎所有现有的单目检测器都无法处理这些情况。实验表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在 KITTI 3D 和 nuScenes 数据集上都取得了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖相机外参的单目3D目标检测方法，解决道路不平整导致的检测性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单目检测方法因忽略相机姿态信息而易受外参变化影响，在工业场景中无法有效处理坑洼、坡道等复杂路面情况。
AI.method: 通过检测灭点和地平线变化预测相机外参，设计潜在空间特征校正模块消除外参扰动影响。
AI.result: 在KITTI 3D和nuScenes数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在复杂路面场景下检测精度提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了外参变化导致的检测失效问题，为真实道路环境下的自动驾驶提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Multi-Source Domain Adaptation for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于目标检测的多源域适应
abstract: To reduce annotation labor associated with object detection, an increasing number of studies focus on transferring the learned knowledge from a labeled source domain to another unlabeled target domain. However, existing methods assume that the labeled data are sampled from a single source domain, which ignores a more generalized scenario, where labeled data are from multiple source domains. For the more challenging task, we propose a unified Faster R-CNN based framework, termed Divide-and-Merge Spindle Network (DMSN), which can simultaneously enhance domain invariance and preserve discriminative power. Specifically, the framework contains multiple source subnets and a pseudo target subnet. First, we propose a hierarchical feature alignment strategy to conduct strong and weak alignments for low- and high-level features, respectively, considering their different effects for object detection. Second, we develop a novel pseudo subnet learning algorithm to approximate optimal parameters of pseudo target subset by weighted combination of parameters in different source subnets. Finally, a consistency regularization for region proposal network is proposed to facilitate each subnet to learn more abstract invariances. Extensive experiments on different adaptation scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: To reduce annotation labor associated with object detection, an increasing number of studies focus on transferring the learned knowledge from a labeled source domain to another unlabeled target domain. However, existing methods assume that the labeled data are sampled from a single source domain, which ignores a more generalized scenario, where labeled data are from multiple source domains. For the more challenging task, we propose a unified Faster R-CNN based framework, termed Divide-and-Merge Spindle Network (DMSN), which can simultaneously enhance domain invariance and preserve discriminative power. Specifically, the framework contains multiple source subnets and a pseudo target subnet. First, we propose a hierarchical feature alignment strategy to conduct strong and weak alignments for low- and high-level features, respectively, considering their different effects for object detection. Second, we develop a novel pseudo subnet learning algorithm to approximate optimal parameters of pseudo target subset by weighted combination of parameters in different source subnets. Finally, a consistency regularization for region proposal network is proposed to facilitate each subnet to learn more abstract invariances. Extensive experiments on different adaptation scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 为了减少与对象检测相关的注释工作，越来越多的研究侧重于将学习的知识从标记的源域转移到另一个未标记的目标域。然而，现有方法假设标记数据是从单个源域采样的，这忽略了更一般的场景，其中标记数据来自多个源域。对于更具挑战性的任务，我们提出了一个基于 Faster R-CNN 的统一框架，称为分而合并主轴网络（DMSN），它可以同时增强域不变性并保持判别力。具体来说，该框架包含多个源子网和一个伪目标子网。首先，考虑到它们对目标检测的不同影响，我们提出了一种分层特征对齐策略，分别对低层和高层特征进行强和弱对齐。其次，我们开发了一种新颖的伪子网学习算法，通过不同源子网中的参数的加权组合来近似伪目标子集的最优参数。最后，提出了区域提议网络的一致性正则化，以方便每个子网学习更多抽象的不变性。对不同适应场景的大量实验证明了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多源领域自适应框架DMSN，用于解决目标检测中多个标注源领域到未标注目标领域的知识迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设标注数据来自单一源领域，但实际场景中多源领域更常见，需同时提升领域不变性与判别能力。

search_text: Multi-Source Domain Adaptation for Object Detection 用于目标检测的多源域适应 To reduce annotation labor associated with object detection, an increasing number of studies focus on transferring the learned knowledge from a labeled source domain to another unlabeled target domain. However, existing methods assume that the labeled data are sampled from a single source domain, which ignores a more generalized scenario, where labeled data are from multiple source domains. For the more challenging task, we propose a unified Faster R-CNN based framework, termed Divide-and-Merge Spindle Network (DMSN), which can simultaneously enhance domain invariance and preserve discriminative power. Specifically, the framework contains multiple source subnets and a pseudo target subnet. First, we propose a hierarchical feature alignment strategy to conduct strong and weak alignments for low- and high-level features, respectively, considering their different effects for object detection. Second, we develop a novel pseudo subnet learning algorithm to approximate optimal parameters of pseudo target subset by weighted combination of parameters in different source subnets. Finally, a consistency regularization for region proposal network is proposed to facilitate each subnet to learn more abstract invariances. Extensive experiments on different adaptation scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model. 为了减少与对象检测相关的注释工作，越来越多的研究侧重于将学习的知识从标记的源域转移到另一个未标记的目标域。然而，现有方法假设标记数据是从单个源域采样的，这忽略了更一般的场景，其中标记数据来自多个源域。对于更具挑战性的任务，我们提出了一个基于 Faster R-CNN 的统一框架，称为分而合并主轴网络（DMSN），它可以同时增强域不变性并保持判别力。具体来说，该框架包含多个源子网和一个伪目标子网。首先，考虑到它们对目标检测的不同影响，我们提出了一种分层特征对齐策略，分别对低层和高层特征进行强和弱对齐。其次，我们开发了一种新颖的伪子网学习算法，通过不同源子网中的参数的加权组合来近似伪目标子集的最优参数。最后，提出了区域提议网络的一致性正则化，以方便每个子网学习更多抽象的不变性。对不同适应场景的大量实验证明了所提出模型的有效性。 本文提出一种多源领域自适应框架DMSN，用于解决目标检测中多个标注源领域到未标注目标领域的知识迁移问题。 Xingxu Yao,Sicheng Zhao,Pengfei Xu,Jufeng Yang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhen Fang,Jie Lu,Anjin Liu,Feng Liu,Guangquan Zhang
title: Learning Bounds for Open-Set Learning
title_zh: 开放式学习的学习界限
comment: Open-set Learning, Open-set Recognition, Machine Learning Theory
comments: Open-set Learning, Open-set Recognition, Machine Learning Theory
abstract: Traditional supervised learning aims to train a classifier in the closed-set world, where training and test samples share the same label space. In this paper, we target a more challenging and realistic setting: open-set learning (OSL), where there exist test samples from the classes that are unseen during training. Although researchers have designed many methods from the algorithmic perspectives, there are few methods that provide generalization guarantees on their ability to achieve consistent performance on different training samples drawn from the same distribution. Motivated by the transfer learning and probably approximate correct (PAC) theory, we make a bold attempt to study OSL by proving its generalization error-given training samples with size n, the estimation error will get close to order O_p(1/\sqrt{n}). This is the first study to provide a generalization bound for OSL, which we do by theoretically investigating the risk of the target classifier on unknown classes. According to our theory, a novel algorithm, called auxiliary open-set risk (AOSR) is proposed to address the OSL problem. Experiments verify the efficacy of AOSR. The code is available at github.com/Anjin-Liu/Openset_Learning_AOSR.

abstract_zh: 传统的监督学习旨在在封闭的世界中训练分类器，其中训练和测试样本共享相同的标签空间。在本文中，我们的目标是更具挑战性和现实的设置：开放集学习（OSL），其中存在来自训练期间看不见的类的测试样本。尽管研究人员从算法角度设计了许多方法，但很少有方法能够提供泛化保证，保证它们在同一分布的不同训练样本上获得一致的性能。在迁移学习和大概近似正确（PAC）理论的推动下，我们大胆尝试通过证明其泛化误差来研究OSL，给定大小为n的训练样本，估计误差将接近O_p(1/\sqrt{n})阶。这是第一项为 OSL 提供泛化界限的研究，我们通过理论上研究目标分类器在未知类上的风险来实现这一点。根据我们的理论，提出了一种称为辅助开放集风险（AOSR）的新算法来解决 OSL 问题。实验验证了AOSR的有效性。代码可在 github.com/Anjin-Liu/Openset_Learning_AOSR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究开放集学习（OSL）的泛化界，提出了一种名为AOSR的新算法以解决OSL问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习假设训练和测试样本共享相同标签空间，而开放集学习面临测试样本包含训练未见类别的挑战，现有方法缺乏泛化性能保证。
AI.method: 基于迁移学习和PAC理论，证明OSL的泛化误差为O_p(1/√n)，并提出辅助开放集风险（AOSR）算法，通过理论分析目标分类器在未知类别的风险。
AI.result: 实验验证了AOSR算法的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为OSL提供泛化界理论，结合理论分析与算法设计，为开放集学习提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Di Wu,Siyuan Li,Zelin Zang,Stan Z. Li
title: Exploring Localization for Self-supervised Fine-grained Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 探索自监督细粒度对比学习的本地化
comment: BMVC 2022 camera-ready. 15 pages (main) with 5 pages appendix
comments: BMVC 2022 camera-ready. 15 pages (main) with 5 pages appendix
abstract: Self-supervised contrastive learning has demonstrated great potential in learning visual representations. Despite their success in various downstream tasks such as image classification and object detection, self-supervised pre-training for fine-grained scenarios is not fully explored. We point out that current contrastive methods are prone to memorizing background/foreground texture and therefore have a limitation in localizing the foreground object. Analysis suggests that learning to extract discriminative texture information and localization are equally crucial for fine-grained self-supervised pre-training. Based on our findings, we introduce cross-view saliency alignment (CVSA), a contrastive learning framework that first crops and swaps saliency regions of images as a novel view generation and then guides the model to localize on foreground objects via a cross-view alignment loss. Extensive experiments on both small- and large-scale fine-grained classification benchmarks show that CVSA significantly improves the learned representation.
summary: Self-supervised contrastive learning has demonstrated great potential in learning visual representations. Despite their success in various downstream tasks such as image classification and object detection, self-supervised pre-training for fine-grained scenarios is not fully explored. Extensive experiments on both small- and large-scale fine-grained classification benchmarks show that CVSA significantly improves the learned representation.
abstract_zh: 自监督对比学习在学习视觉表征方面表现出了巨大的潜力。尽管它们在图像分类和目标检测等各种下游任务中取得了成功，但细粒度场景的自监督预训练尚未得到充分探索。我们指出，当前的对比方法容易记住背景/前景纹理，因此在定位前景对象方面存在限制。分析表明，学习提取有区别的纹理信息和定位对于细粒度自监督预训练同样重要。根据我们的发现，我们引入了跨视图显着性对齐（CVSA），这是一种对比学习框架，它首先裁剪和交换图像的显着性区域作为新的视图生成，然后引导模型通过跨视图对齐损失来定位前景对象。对小型和大规​​模细粒度分类基准的大量实验表明，CVSA 显着改善了学习表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督细粒度对比学习方法，通过改进定位能力提升细粒度视觉表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督对比学习方法在细粒度场景中易过度关注背景/前景纹理，导致无法准确定位目标区域，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 引入交叉视图显著性对齐（CVSA）框架，通过裁剪交换图像显著性区域生成新视图，并利用交叉视图对齐损失引导模型聚焦前景对象。
AI.result: 在多个细粒度分类基准测试中，CVSA显著提升了预训练模型的表示能力，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 定位能力与纹理学习同样关键，CVSA通过显式对齐机制有效解决了细粒度自监督预训练中的定位局限性。

Based on our findings, we introduce cross-view saliency alignment (CVSA), a contrastive learning framework that first crops and swaps saliency regions of images as a novel view generation and then guides the model to localize on foreground objects via a cross-view alignment loss. Extensive experiments on both small- and large-scale fine-grained classification benchmarks show that CVSA significantly improves the learned representation. 自监督对比学习在学习视觉表征方面表现出了巨大的潜力。尽管它们在图像分类和目标检测等各种下游任务中取得了成功，但细粒度场景的自监督预训练尚未得到充分探索。我们指出，当前的对比方法容易记住背景/前景纹理，因此在定位前景对象方面存在限制。分析表明，学习提取有区别的纹理信息和定位对于细粒度自监督预训练同样重要。根据我们的发现，我们引入了跨视图显着性对齐（CVSA），这是一种对比学习框架，它首先裁剪和交换图像的显着性区域作为新的视图生成，然后引导模型通过跨视图对齐损失来定位前景对象。对小型和大规​​模细粒度分类基准的大量实验表明，CVSA 显着改善了学习表示。 本文提出一种自监督细粒度对比学习方法，通过改进定位能力提升细粒度视觉表示学习。 Di Wu,Siyuan Li,Zelin Zang,Stan Z. Li cs.CV

title: Long-Short Temporal Modeling for Efficient Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于高效动作识别的长短时态建模
abstract: Efficient long-short temporal modeling is key for enhancing the performance of action recognition task. In this paper, we propose a new two-stream action recognition network, termed as MENet, consisting of a Motion Enhancement (ME) module and a Video-level Aggregation (VLA) module to achieve long-short temporal modeling. Specifically, motion representations have been proved effective in capturing short-term and high-frequency action. However, current motion representations are calculated from adjacent frames, which may have poor interpretation and bring useless information (noisy or blank). Thus, for short-term motions, we design an efficient ME module to enhance the short-term motions by mingling the motion saliency among neighboring segments. As for long-term aggregations, VLA is adopted at the top of the appearance branch to integrate the long-term dependencies across all segments. The two components of MENet are complementary in temporal modeling. Extensive experiments are conducted on UCF101 and HMDB51 benchmarks, which verify the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed MENet.

abstract_zh: 高效的长短时间建模是提高动作识别任务性能的关键。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的双流动作识别网络，称为 MENet，由运动增强（ME）模块和视频级聚合（VLA）模块组成，以实现长短时间建模。具体来说，运动表示已被证明在捕捉短期和高频动作方面是有效的。然而，当前的运动表示是根据相邻帧计算的，这可能具有较差的解释并带来无用的信息（噪声或空白）。因此，对于短期运动，我们设计了一个高效的 ME 模块，通过混合相邻片段之间的运动显着性来增强短期运动。对于长期聚合，在外观分支的顶部采用VLA来集成所有段之间的长期依赖关系。 MENet 的两个组件在时间建模方面是互补的。在 UCF101 和 HMDB51 基准上进行了大量的实验，验证了我们提出的 MENet 的有效性和效率。

AI.motivation: 现有运动表示易受相邻帧噪声干扰，且难以有效捕捉长时依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计包含运动增强模块（ME）与视频级聚合模块（VLA）的双流网络MENet，分别处理短时运动与长时依赖。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上验证了MENet的有效性与效率。
AI.conclusion: MENet通过长短时序建模的互补性设计，在动作识别任务中表现优异。

title: Dense Graph Convolutional Neural Networks on 3D Meshes for 3D Object Segmentation and Classification
title_zh: 3D 网格上的密集图卷积神经网络用于 3D 对象分割和分类
abstract: This paper presents new designs of graph convolutional neural networks (GCNs) on 3D meshes for 3D object segmentation and classification. We use the faces of the mesh as basic processing units and represent a 3D mesh as a graph where each node corresponds to a face. To enhance the descriptive power of the graph, we introduce a 1-ring face neighbourhood structure to derive novel multi-dimensional spatial and structure features to represent the graph nodes. Based on this new graph representation, we then design a densely connected graph convolutional block which aggregates local and regional features as the key construction component to build effective and efficient practical GCN models for 3D object classification and segmentation. We will present experimental results to show that our new technique outperforms state of the art where our models are shown to have the smallest number of parameters and consietently achieve the highest accuracies across a number of benchmark datasets. We will also present ablation studies to demonstrate the soundness of our design principles and the effectiveness of our practical models.
summary: This paper presents new designs of graph convolutional neural networks (GCNs) on 3D meshes for 3D object segmentation and classification. We use the faces of the mesh as basic processing units and represent a 3D mesh as a graph where each node corresponds to a face. To enhance the descriptive power of the graph, we introduce a 1-ring face neighbourhood structure to derive novel multi-dimensional spatial and structure features to represent the graph nodes. Based on this new graph representation, we then design a densely connected graph convolutional block which aggregates local and regional features as the key construction component to build effective and efficient practical GCN models for 3D object classification and segmentation. We will present experimental results to show that our new technique outperforms state of the art where our models are shown to have the smallest number of parameters and consietently achieve the highest accuracies across a number of benchmark datasets. We will also present ablation studies to demonstrate the soundness of our design principles and the effectiveness of our practical models.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 3D 网格上图卷积神经网络 (GCN) 的新设计，用于 3D 对象分割和分类。我们使用网格的面作为基本处理单元，并将 3D 网格表示为图形，其中每个节点对应一个面。为了增强图的描述能力，我们引入了 1 环面邻域结构来导出新颖的多维空间和结构特征来表示图节点。基于这种新的图表示，我们设计了一个密集连接的图卷积块，它聚合局部和区域特征作为关键构建组件，以构建用于 3D 对象分类和分割的有效且高效的实用 GCN 模型。我们将展示实验结果，以表明我们的新技术优于现有技术，我们的模型具有最少数量的参数，并在多个基准数据集上持续实现最高准确度。我们还将提出消融研究，以证明我们设计原则的合理性和实际模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密集图卷积神经网络（GCNs）的3D网格处理方法，用于3D物体分割和分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统图卷积方法在处理3D网格时未能充分捕捉局部和全局结构特征，且参数效率较低，需改进表示能力和模型效率。
AI.method: 以网格面片为节点构建图结构，引入1环面片邻域生成多维空间特征，并设计密集连接的图卷积块以融合局部与区域特征。
AI.result: 模型在多个基准数据集上取得最高分类准确率，参数量最少；消融实验验证了设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的图表示和密集连接结构，在保持高效性的同时显著提升了3D物体分割与分类性能。

authors_text: Motoya Ohnishi,Isao Ishikawa,Kendall Lowrey,Masahiro Ikeda,Sham Kakade,Yoshinobu Kawahara
title: Koopman Spectrum Nonlinear Regulators and Efficient Online Learning
title_zh: 库普曼谱非线性调节器和高效在线学习
abstract: Most modern reinforcement learning algorithms optimize a cumulative single-step cost along a trajectory. The optimized motions are often 'unnatural', representing, for example, behaviors with sudden accelerations that waste energy and lack predictability. In this work, we present a novel paradigm of controlling nonlinear systems via the minimization of the Koopman spectrum cost: a cost over the Koopman operator of the controlled dynamics. This induces a broader class of dynamical behaviors that evolve over stable manifolds such as nonlinear oscillators, closed loops, and smooth movements. We demonstrate that some dynamics characterizations that are not possible with a cumulative cost are feasible in this paradigm, which generalizes the classical eigenstructure and pole assignments to nonlinear decision making. Moreover, we present a sample efficient online learning algorithm for our problem that enjoys a sub-linear regret bound under some structural assumptions.
summary: Most modern reinforcement learning algorithms optimize a cumulative single-step cost along a trajectory. The optimized motions are often 'unnatural', representing, for example, behaviors with sudden accelerations that waste energy and lack predictability. In this work, we present a novel paradigm of controlling nonlinear systems via the minimization of the Koopman spectrum cost: a cost over the Koopman operator of the controlled dynamics. This induces a broader class of dynamical behaviors that evolve over stable manifolds such as nonlinear oscillators, closed loops, and smooth movements. We demonstrate that some dynamics characterizations that are not possible with a cumulative cost are feasible in this paradigm, which generalizes the classical eigenstructure and pole assignments to nonlinear decision making. Moreover, we present a sample efficient online learning algorithm for our problem that enjoys a sub-linear regret bound under some structural assumptions.
abstract_zh: 大多数现代强化学习算法都会优化沿轨迹的累积单步成本。优化的运动通常是“不自然的”，例如代表浪费能量且缺乏可预测性的突然加速的行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过最小化库普曼谱成本来控制非线性系统的新颖范例：受控动态的库普曼算子的成本。这引发了更广泛的动力学行为，这些行为在稳定流形上演化，例如非线性振荡器、闭环和平滑运动。我们证明了一些用累积成本不可能实现的动力学特征在这个范式中是可行的，它将经典的特征结构和极点分配推广到非线性决策。此外，我们针对我们的问题提出了一种有效的在线学习算法样本，该算法在某些结构假设下具有亚线性后悔界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Koopman谱成本的非线性系统控制方法，并设计了一种高效的在线学习算法，以实现更自然的动态行为。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习优化累积单步成本导致行为不自然（如突兀加速），缺乏能量效率和可预测性，需通过新范式诱导稳定流形上的动态行为。
AI.method: 通过最小化Koopman算子的谱成本，推广经典特征结构和极点分配，并提出样本高效的在线学习算法。
AI.result: 实现了传统方法无法实现的动态特征（如非线性振荡器和闭环运动），并证明了算法的次线性遗憾界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效控制非线性系统生成自然动态行为，且在线学习算法具有高效性，为非线性决策提供了新范式。

search_text: Koopman Spectrum Nonlinear Regulators and Efficient Online Learning 库普曼谱非线性调节器和高效在线学习 Most modern reinforcement learning algorithms optimize a cumulative single-step cost along a trajectory. The optimized motions are often 'unnatural', representing, for example, behaviors with sudden accelerations that waste energy and lack predictability. In this work, we present a novel paradigm of controlling nonlinear systems via the minimization of the Koopman spectrum cost: a cost over the Koopman operator of the controlled dynamics. This induces a broader class of dynamical behaviors that evolve over stable manifolds such as nonlinear oscillators, closed loops, and smooth movements. We demonstrate that some dynamics characterizations that are not possible with a cumulative cost are feasible in this paradigm, which generalizes the classical eigenstructure and pole assignments to nonlinear decision making. Moreover, we present a sample efficient online learning algorithm for our problem that enjoys a sub-linear regret bound under some structural assumptions. 大多数现代强化学习算法都会优化沿轨迹的累积单步成本。优化的运动通常是“不自然的”，例如代表浪费能量且缺乏可预测性的突然加速的行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过最小化库普曼谱成本来控制非线性系统的新颖范例：受控动态的库普曼算子的成本。这引发了更广泛的动力学行为，这些行为在稳定流形上演化，例如非线性振荡器、闭环和平滑运动。我们证明了一些用累积成本不可能实现的动力学特征在这个范式中是可行的，它将经典的特征结构和极点分配推广到非线性决策。此外，我们针对我们的问题提出了一种有效的在线学习算法样本，该算法在某些结构假设下具有亚线性后悔界限。 本文提出了一种基于Koopman谱成本的非线性系统控制方法，并设计了一种高效的在线学习算法，以实现更自然的动态行为。 Motoya Ohnishi,Isao Ishikawa,Kendall Lowrey,Masahiro Ikeda,Sham Kakade,Yoshinobu Kawahara cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

title: A Diverse Corpus for Evaluating and Developing English Math Word Problem Solvers
title_zh: 用于评估和开发英语数学应用题解决者的多样化语料库
abstract: We present ASDiv (Academia Sinica Diverse MWP Dataset), a diverse (in terms of both language patterns and problem types) English math word problem (MWP) corpus for evaluating the capability of various MWP solvers. Existing MWP corpora for studying AI progress remain limited either in language usage patterns or in problem types. We thus present a new English MWP corpus with 2,305 MWPs that cover more text patterns and most problem types taught in elementary school. Each MWP is annotated with its problem type and grade level (for indicating the level of difficulty). Furthermore, we propose a metric to measure the lexicon usage diversity of a given MWP corpus, and demonstrate that ASDiv is more diverse than existing corpora. Experiments show that our proposed corpus reflects the true capability of MWP solvers more faithfully.

abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ASDiv（中央研究院多元化 MWP 数据集），这是一个多样化（在语言模式和问题类型方面）的英语数学单词问题 (MWP) 语料库，用于评估各种 MWP 求解器的能力。现有的用于研究人工智能进展的 MWP 语料库在语言使用模式或问题类型方面仍然有限。因此，我们提出了一个新的英语 MWP 语料库，其中包含 2,305 个 MWP，涵盖更多文本模式和小学教授的大多数问题类型。每个 MWP 都标有其问题类型和等级（用于指示难度级别）。此外，我们提出了一个度量标准来衡量给定 MWP 语料库的词典使用多样性，并证明 ASDiv 比现有语料库更加多样化。实验表明，我们提出的语料库更忠实地反映了 MWP 求解器的真实能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASDiv语料库，用于评估和开发英语数学应用题求解器，涵盖更多语言模式和问题类型。
AI.motivation: 现有数学应用题语料库在语言表达或问题类型上存在局限，难以全面评估求解器能力。
AI.method: 构建包含2,305道题的英语数学应用题语料库，覆盖多样文本模式及小学主要题型，标注题型与年级，并提出词汇多样性评估指标。
AI.result: ASDiv在语言多样性指标上优于现有语料库，实验表明其能更真实反映求解器的实际能力。
AI.conclusion: ASDiv为数学应用题求解器的研究提供了更全面的评估基准，推动相关技术发展。

authors_text: Zhihong Zhang,Chao Deng,Yang Liu,Xin Yuan,Jinli Suo,Qionghai Dai
title: 10-mega pixel snapshot compressive imaging with a hybrid coded aperture
title_zh: 具有混合编码孔径的 10 兆像素快照压缩成像
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, accepted by Photonics Research
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, accepted by Photonics Research
abstract: High resolution images are widely used in our daily life, whereas high-speed video capture is challenging due to the low frame rate of cameras working at the high resolution mode. Digging deeper, the main bottleneck lies in the low throughput of existing imaging systems. Towards this end, snapshot compressive imaging (SCI) was proposed as a promising solution to improve the throughput of imaging systems by compressive sampling and computational reconstruction. During acquisition, multiple high-speed images are encoded and collapsed to a single measurement. After this, algorithms are employed to retrieve the video frames from the coded snapshot. Recently developed Plug-and-Play (PnP) algorithms make it possible for SCI reconstruction in large-scale problems. However, the lack of high-resolution encoding systems still precludes SCI's wide application. In this paper, we build a novel hybrid coded aperture snapshot compressive imaging (HCA-SCI) system by incorporating a dynamic liquid crystal on silicon and a high-resolution lithography mask. We further implement a PnP reconstruction algorithm with cascaded denoisers for high quality reconstruction. Based on the proposed HCA-SCI system and algorithm, we achieve a 10-mega pixel SCI system to capture high-speed scenes, leading to a high throughput of 4.6G voxels per second. Both simulation and real data experiments verify the feasibility and performance of our proposed HCA-SCI scheme.

abstract_zh: 高分辨率图像在我们的日常生活中广泛使用，而由于相机在高分​​辨率模式下工作的帧速率较低，高速视频捕获具有挑战性。深入挖掘，主要瓶颈在于现有成像系统的低吞吐量。为此，快照压缩成像（SCI）被提出作为一种有前途的解决方案，通过压缩采样和计算重建来提高成像系统的吞吐量。在采集过程中，多个高速图像被编码并压缩为单个测量结果。此后，采用算法从编码快照中检索视频帧。最近开发的即插即用 (PnP) 算法使大规模问题的 SCI 重建成为可能。然而，高分辨率编码系统的缺乏仍然阻碍了SCI的广泛应用。在本文中，我们通过结合硅上动态液晶和高分辨率光刻掩模，构建了一种新型混合编码孔径快照压缩成像（HCA-SCI）系统。我们进一步实现了具有级联降噪器的 PnP 重建算法，以实现高质量重建。基于所提出的 HCA-SCI 系统和算法，我们实现了 10 兆像素 SCI 系统来捕获高速场景，从而实现每秒 4.6G 体素的高吞吐量。仿真和真实数据实验验证了我们提出的 HCA-SCI 方案的可行性和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合编码孔径快照压缩成像系统（HCA-SCI），结合动态液晶硅与高分辨率光刻掩模，并采用级联去噪器的PnP算法，实现1000万像素高速场景捕捉。
AI.motivation: 现有成像系统吞吐量低，限制高速视频捕获；尽管快照压缩成像（SCI）可提升吞吐量，但缺乏高分辨率编码系统阻碍其应用。
AI.method: 设计HCA-SCI系统，集成动态液晶硅与高分辨率光刻掩模，开发带有级联去噪器的PnP重建算法以实现高质量图像恢复。
AI.result: 实现1000万像素SCI系统，吞吐量达4.6G体素/秒，仿真与真实数据验证了系统的可行性与性能。
AI.conclusion: HCA-SCI系统通过硬件创新与算法优化，为高分辨率高速成像提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yisroel Mirsky,Ambra Demontis,Jaidip Kotak,Ram Shankar,Deng Gelei,Liu Yang,Xiangyu Zhang,Wenke Lee,Yuval Elovici,Battista Biggio
title: The Threat of Offensive AI to Organizations
title_zh: 进攻性人工智能对组织的威胁
abstract: AI has provided us with the ability to automate tasks, extract information from vast amounts of data, and synthesize media that is nearly indistinguishable from the real thing. However, positive tools can also be used for negative purposes. In particular, cyber adversaries can use AI (such as machine learning) to enhance their attacks and expand their campaigns. Although offensive AI has been discussed in the past, there is a need to analyze and understand the threat in the context of organizations. For example, how does an AI-capable adversary impact the cyber kill chain? Does AI benefit the attacker more than the defender? What are the most significant AI threats facing organizations today and what will be their impact on the future? In this survey, we explore the threat of offensive AI on organizations. First, we present the background and discuss how AI changes the adversary's methods, strategies, goals, and overall attack model. Then, through a literature review, we identify 33 offensive AI capabilities which adversaries can use to enhance their attacks. Finally, through a user study spanning industry and academia, we rank the AI threats and provide insights on the adversaries.
summary: AI has provided us with the ability to automate tasks, extract information from vast amounts of data, and synthesize media that is nearly indistinguishable from the real thing. However, positive tools can also be used for negative purposes. In particular, cyber adversaries can use AI (such as machine learning) to enhance their attacks and expand their campaigns. Although offensive AI has been discussed in the past, there is a need to analyze and understand the threat in the context of organizations. For example, how does an AI-capable adversary impact the cyber kill chain? Does AI benefit the attacker more than the defender? What are the most significant AI threats facing organizations today and what will be their impact on the future? In this survey, we explore the threat of offensive AI on organizations. First, we present the background and discuss how AI changes the adversary's methods, strategies, goals, and overall attack model. Then, through a literature review, we identify 33 offensive AI capabilities which adversaries can use to enhance their attacks. Finally, through a user study spanning industry and academia, we rank the AI threats and provide insights on the adversaries.
abstract_zh: 人工智能为我们提供了自动化任务、从大量数据中提取信息以及合成与真实事物几乎没有区别的媒体的能力。然而，积极的工具也可以用于消极的目的。特别是，网络对手可以使用人工智能（例如机器学习）来增强他们的攻击并扩大他们的活动。尽管过去已经讨论过进攻性人工智能，但仍需要在组织背景下分析和理解威胁。例如，具有人工智能能力的对手如何影响网络杀伤链？人工智能对攻击者的好处是否比防御者大？当今组织面临的最重大的人工智能威胁是什么？它们对未来有何影响？在这项调查中，我们探讨了攻击性人工智能对组织的威胁。首先，我们介绍背景并讨论人工智能如何改变对手的方法、策略、目标和整体攻击模型。然后，通过文献综述，我们确定了 33 种攻击性 AI 功能，对手可以利用这些功能来增强攻击。最后，通过跨行业和学术界的用户研究，我们对人工智能威胁进行排名并提供有关对手的见解。

AI.motivation: AI技术具备双刃剑特性，现有研究缺乏对组织层面进攻性AI威胁的系统分析。
AI.method: 通过文献综述识别33种进攻性AI能力，并结合行业与学术界用户研究进行威胁排序。
AI.result: 确定了当前组织面临的最显著AI威胁，并评估其对网络攻击链及攻防平衡的影响。
AI.conclusion: 进攻性AI显著增强攻击者能力，组织需优先应对深度伪造、自动化渗透等高危威胁。

authors_text: Haifeng Li,Jun Cao,Jiawei Zhu,Yu Liu,Qing Zhu,Guohua Wu
title: Curvature Graph Neural Network
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved great success in many graph-based tasks. Much work is dedicated to empowering GNNs with the adaptive locality ability, which enables measuring the importance of neighboring nodes to the target node by a node-specific mechanism. However, the current node-specific mechanisms are deficient in distinguishing the importance of nodes in the topology structure. We believe that the structural importance of neighboring nodes is closely related to their importance in aggregation. In this paper, we introduce discrete graph curvature (the Ricci curvature) to quantify the strength of structural connection of pairwise nodes. And we propose Curvature Graph Neural Network (CGNN), which effectively improves the adaptive locality ability of GNNs by leveraging the structural property of graph curvature. To improve the adaptability of curvature to various datasets, we explicitly transform curvature into the weights of neighboring nodes by the necessary Negative Curvature Processing Module and Curvature Normalization Module. Then, we conduct numerous experiments on various synthetic datasets and real-world datasets. The experimental results on synthetic datasets show that CGNN effectively exploits the topology structure information, and the performance is improved significantly. CGNN outperforms the baselines on 5 dense node classification benchmark datasets. This study deepens the understanding of how to utilize advanced topology information and assign the importance of neighboring nodes from the perspective of graph curvature and encourages us to bridge the gap between graph theory and neural networks.

abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在许多基于图的任务中取得了巨大的成功。许多工作致力于赋予 GNN 自适应局部性能力，从而能够通过特定于节点的机制来测量相邻节点对目标节点的重要性。然而，当前的节点特定机制在区分拓扑结构中节点的重要性方面存在缺陷。我们认为，相邻节点的结构重要性与其在聚合中的重要性密切相关。在本文中，我们引入离散图曲率（Ricci曲率）来量化成对节点的结构连接强度。我们提出了曲率图神经网络（CGNN），它利用图曲率的结构特性有效地提高了 GNN 的自适应局部性能力。为了提高曲率对各种数据集的适应性，我们通过必要的负曲率处理模块和曲率归一化模块将曲率显式转换为相邻节点的权重。然后，我们对各种合成数据集和真实世界数据集进行了大量实验。在合成数据集上的实验结果表明，CGNN有效利用了拓扑结构信息，性能显着提高。 CGNN 在 5 个密集节点分类基准数据集上的性能优于基线。这项研究加深了对如何利用高级拓扑信息并从图曲率的角度分配相邻节点重要性的理解，并鼓励我们弥合图论和神经网络之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离散图曲率（Ricci曲率）的曲率图神经网络（CGNN），通过量化节点间的结构连接强度，提升图神经网络（GNN）的自适应局部性能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN的节点特定机制在区分拓扑结构中邻接节点重要性方面存在不足，而结构重要性与聚合过程密切相关。传统方法未能有效利用图曲率这一高级拓扑信息。
AI.method: 引入离散图曲率量化节点对的结构连接强度，设计负曲率处理模块和曲率归一化模块，将曲率显式转化为邻接节点权重，增强模型对不同数据集的适应性。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和现实数据集上的实验表明，CGNN有效利用拓扑结构信息，在5个密集节点分类基准数据集上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究深化了从图曲率视角利用高级拓扑信息并分配邻接节点重要性的理解，推动了图论与神经网络的融合。

title: A Conditional Splitting Framework for Efficient Constituency Parsing
title_zh: 一种高效选区解析的条件分裂框架
abstract: We introduce a generic seq2seq parsing framework that casts constituency parsing problems (syntactic and discourse parsing) into a series of conditional splitting decisions. Our parsing model estimates the conditional probability distribution of possible splitting points in a given text span and supports efficient top-down decoding, which is linear in number of nodes. The conditional splitting formulation together with efficient beam search inference facilitate structural consistency without relying on expensive structured inference. Crucially, for discourse analysis we show that in our formulation, discourse segmentation can be framed as a special case of parsing which allows us to perform discourse parsing without requiring segmentation as a pre-requisite. Experiments show that our model achieves good results on the standard syntactic parsing tasks under settings with/without pre-trained representations and rivals state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods that are more computationally expensive than ours. In discourse parsing, our method outperforms SoTA by a good margin.
summary: We introduce a generic seq2seq parsing framework that casts constituency parsing problems (syntactic and discourse parsing) into a series of conditional splitting decisions. Our parsing model estimates the conditional probability distribution of possible splitting points in a given text span and supports efficient top-down decoding, which is linear in number of nodes. The conditional splitting formulation together with efficient beam search inference facilitate structural consistency without relying on expensive structured inference. Crucially, for discourse analysis we show that in our formulation, discourse segmentation can be framed as a special case of parsing which allows us to perform discourse parsing without requiring segmentation as a pre-requisite. Experiments show that our model achieves good results on the standard syntactic parsing tasks under settings with/without pre-trained representations and rivals state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods that are more computationally expensive than ours. In discourse parsing, our method outperforms SoTA by a good margin.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个通用的 seq2seq 解析框架，它将选区解析问题（句法和语篇解析）转化为一系列条件分裂决策。我们的解析模型估计给定文本范围中可能分裂点的条件概率分布，并支持高效的自上而下解码，这与节点数量呈线性关系。条件分裂公式与高效的波束搜索推理一起促进结构一致性，而不依赖于昂贵的结构化推理。至关重要的是，对于语篇分析，我们表明，在我们的表述中，语篇分段可以被视为语法分析的一种特殊情况，这使我们能够在不需要分段作为先决条件的情况下执行语篇语法分析。实验表明，我们的模型在有/没有预训练表示的设置下在标准句法解析任务上取得了良好的结果，并且可以与比我们的计算成本更高的最先进（SoTA）方法相媲美。在语篇解析中，我们的方法明显优于 SoTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的序列到序列解析框架，将 constituency parsing（句法和话语解析）转化为一系列条件分割决策问题，实现高效解析。
AI.motivation: 传统解析方法依赖复杂结构推理或预分割步骤，效率低且难以统一处理不同解析任务。本文旨在设计一种无需预分割、计算高效的通用解析框架。
AI.method: 通过条件分割概率建模文本跨度的分割点，结合自顶向下线性复杂度解码与束搜索，将话语分割作为解析特例处理，无需预分割步骤。
AI.result: 在句法解析任务中表现与现有最优方法相当且计算成本更低；在话语解析任务中显著超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为句法与话语解析提供了统一高效解决方案，通过条件分割建模和高效推理机制实现了结构一致性与计算效率的平衡。

search_text: A Conditional Splitting Framework for Efficient Constituency Parsing 一种高效选区解析的条件分裂框架 We introduce a generic seq2seq parsing framework that casts constituency parsing problems (syntactic and discourse parsing) into a series of conditional splitting decisions. Our parsing model estimates the conditional probability distribution of possible splitting points in a given text span and supports efficient top-down decoding, which is linear in number of nodes. The conditional splitting formulation together with efficient beam search inference facilitate structural consistency without relying on expensive structured inference. Crucially, for discourse analysis we show that in our formulation, discourse segmentation can be framed as a special case of parsing which allows us to perform discourse parsing without requiring segmentation as a pre-requisite. Experiments show that our model achieves good results on the standard syntactic parsing tasks under settings with/without pre-trained representations and rivals state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods that are more computationally expensive than ours. In discourse parsing, our method outperforms SoTA by a good margin. 我们引入了一个通用的 seq2seq 解析框架，它将选区解析问题（句法和语篇解析）转化为一系列条件分裂决策。我们的解析模型估计给定文本范围中可能分裂点的条件概率分布，并支持高效的自上而下解码，这与节点数量呈线性关系。条件分裂公式与高效的波束搜索推理一起促进结构一致性，而不依赖于昂贵的结构化推理。至关重要的是，对于语篇分析，我们表明，在我们的表述中，语篇分段可以被视为语法分析的一种特殊情况，这使我们能够在不需要分段作为先决条件的情况下执行语篇语法分析。实验表明，我们的模型在有/没有预训练表示的设置下在标准句法解析任务上取得了良好的结果，并且可以与比我们的计算成本更高的最先进（SoTA）方法相媲美。在语篇解析中，我们的方法明显优于 SoTA。 本文提出了一种通用的序列到序列解析框架，将 constituency parsing（句法和话语解析）转化为一系列条件分割决策问题，实现高效解析。 Thanh-Tung Nguyen,Xuan-Phi Nguyen,Shafiq Joty,Xiaoli Li cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Dual GNNs: Graph Neural Network Learning with Limited Supervision
title_zh: 双 GNN：有限监督下的图神经网络学习
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) require a relatively large number of labeled nodes and a reliable/uncorrupted graph connectivity structure in order to obtain good performance on the semi-supervised node classification task. The performance of GNNs can degrade significantly as the number of labeled nodes decreases or the graph connectivity structure is corrupted by adversarial attacks or due to noises in data measurement /collection. Therefore, it is important to develop GNN models that are able to achieve good performance when there is limited supervision knowledge -- a few labeled nodes and noisy graph structures. In this paper, we propose a novel Dual GNN learning framework to address this challenge task. The proposed framework has two GNN based node prediction modules. The primary module uses the input graph structure to induce regular node embeddings and predictions with a regular GNN baseline, while the auxiliary module constructs a new graph structure through fine-grained spectral clusterings and learns new node embeddings and predictions. By integrating the two modules in a dual GNN learning framework, we perform joint learning in an end-to-end fashion. This general framework can be applied on many GNN baseline models. The experimental results validate that the proposed dual GNN framework can greatly outperform the GNN baseline methods when the labeled nodes are scarce and the graph connectivity structure is noisy.

abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）需要相对大量的标记节点和可靠/未损坏的图连接结构，以便在半监督节点分类任务上获得良好的性能。随着标记节点数量的减少或图连接结构因对抗性攻击或数据测量/收集中的噪声而被破坏，GNN 的性能可能会显着下降。因此，开发在监督知识有限（一些标记节点和噪声图结构）时能够实现良好性能的 GNN 模型非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双 GNN 学习框架来解决这一挑战任务。所提出的框架有两个基于 GNN 的节点预测模块。主模块使用输入图结构通过常规 GNN 基线诱导常规节点嵌入和预测，而辅助模块通过细粒度谱聚类构建新的图结构并学习新的节点嵌入和预测。通过将这两个模块集成到双 GNN 学习框架中，我们以端到端的方式执行联合学习。这个通用框架可以应用于许多 GNN 基线模型。实验结果验证了当标记节点稀缺且图连接结构有噪声时，所提出的双 GNN 框架可以大大优于 GNN 基线方法。

AI.tldr: 提出双GNN框架以在有限监督和噪声图结构下提升图神经网络的节点分类性能
AI.motivation: 传统GNN在标记节点稀缺或图结构存在噪声时性能下降，需开发鲁棒的模型以应对有限监督和噪声问题
AI.method: 提出双GNN框架，包含主模块和辅助模块，分别利用原始图结构和光谱聚类生成的图结构进行联合学习，提升模型鲁棒性
AI.result: 实验表明，双GNN框架在少量标记节点和噪声图结构下显著优于传统GNN基线方法
AI.conclusion: 双GNN框架有效提升了GNN在有限监督和噪声图结构下的性能，适用于多种GNN基线模型

authors_text: Lei Ding,Dong Lin,Shaofu Lin,Jing Zhang,Xiaojie Cui,Yuebin Wang,Hao Tang,Lorenzo Bruzzone
title: Looking Outside the Window: Wide-Context Transformer for the Semantic Segmentation of High-Resolution Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 看看窗外：用于高分辨率遥感图像语义分割的宽上下文转换器
abstract: Long-range contextual information is crucial for the semantic segmentation of High-Resolution (HR) Remote Sensing Images (RSIs). However, image cropping operations, commonly used for training neural networks, limit the perception of long-range contexts in large RSIs. To overcome this limitation, we propose a Wide-Context Network (WiCoNet) for the semantic segmentation of HR RSIs. Apart from extracting local features with a conventional CNN, the WiCoNet has an extra context branch to aggregate information from a larger image area. Moreover, we introduce a Context Transformer to embed contextual information from the context branch and selectively project it onto the local features. The Context Transformer extends the Vision Transformer, an emerging kind of neural network, to model the dual-branch semantic correlations. It overcomes the locality limitation of CNNs and enables the WiCoNet to see the bigger picture before segmenting the land-cover/land-use (LCLU) classes. Ablation studies and comparative experiments conducted on several benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. In addition, we present a new Beijing Land-Use (BLU) dataset. This is a large-scale HR satellite dataset with high-quality and fine-grained reference labels, which can facilitate future studies in this field.

abstract_zh: 远程上下文信息对于高分辨率（HR）遥感图像（RSI）的语义分割至关重要。然而，通常用于训练神经网络的图像裁剪操作限制了大 RSI 中远程上下文的感知。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种用于 HR RSI 语义分割的宽上下文网络 (WiCoNet)。除了使用传统 CNN 提取局部特征外，WiCoNet 还具有额外的上下文分支来聚合来自更大图像区域的信息。此外，我们引入了上下文转换器来嵌入来自上下文分支的上下文信息，并有选择地将其投影到局部特征上。 Context Transformer 扩展了 Vision Transformer（一种新兴的神经网络）来对双分支语义相关性进行建模。它克服了 CNN 的局部性限制，使 WiCoNet 在分割土地覆盖/土地利用 (LCLU) 类别之前能够看到更大的图景。在几个基准数据集上进行的消融研究和比较实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。此外，我们还提供了一个新的北京土地利用（BLU）数据集。这是一个大规模的HR卫星数据集，具有高质量、细粒度的参考标签，可以促进该领域的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于宽上下文变换器（WiCoNet）的高分辨率遥感图像语义分割方法，通过结合局部特征和全局上下文信息提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率遥感图像的语义分割需要长距离上下文信息，但传统图像裁剪操作限制了模型对大范围场景的感知能力，现有方法难以有效捕捉全局信息。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络结构：1）使用常规CNN提取局部特征；2）引入上下文分支和Context Transformer模块，通过自注意力机制聚合更大范围的上下文信息，并将其选择性投影到局部特征上。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和新构建的北京土地利用数据集（BLU）上验证了方法有效性，实验表明该方法在分割精度上优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: WiCoNet通过融合局部特征与全局上下文信息，显著提升了高分辨率遥感图像的语义分割性能，同时发布的BLU数据集为后续研究提供了高质量基准。

method: 设计双分支网络结构：1）使用常规CNN提取局部特征；2）引入上下文分支和Context Transformer模块，通过自注意力机制聚合更大范围的上下文信息，并将其选择性投影到局部特征上。
result: 在多个基准数据集和新构建的北京土地利用数据集（BLU）上验证了方法有效性，实验表明该方法在分割精度上优于现有模型。
conclusion: WiCoNet通过融合局部特征与全局上下文信息，显著提升了高分辨率遥感图像的语义分割性能，同时发布的BLU数据集为后续研究提供了高质量基准。
search_text: Looking Outside the Window: Wide-Context Transformer for the Semantic Segmentation of High-Resolution Remote Sensing Images 看看窗外：用于高分辨率遥感图像语义分割的宽上下文转换器 Long-range contextual information is crucial for the semantic segmentation of High-Resolution (HR) Remote Sensing Images (RSIs). However, image cropping operations, commonly used for training neural networks, limit the perception of long-range contexts in large RSIs. To overcome this limitation, we propose a Wide-Context Network (WiCoNet) for the semantic segmentation of HR RSIs. Apart from extracting local features with a conventional CNN, the WiCoNet has an extra context branch to aggregate information from a larger image area. Moreover, we introduce a Context Transformer to embed contextual information from the context branch and selectively project it onto the local features. The Context Transformer extends the Vision Transformer, an emerging kind of neural network, to model the dual-branch semantic correlations. It overcomes the locality limitation of CNNs and enables the WiCoNet to see the bigger picture before segmenting the land-cover/land-use (LCLU) classes. Ablation studies and comparative experiments conducted on several benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. In addition, we present a new Beijing Land-Use (BLU) dataset. This is a large-scale HR satellite dataset with high-quality and fine-grained reference labels, which can facilitate future studies in this field. 远程上下文信息对于高分辨率（HR）遥感图像（RSI）的语义分割至关重要。然而，通常用于训练神经网络的图像裁剪操作限制了大 RSI 中远程上下文的感知。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种用于 HR RSI 语义分割的宽上下文网络 (WiCoNet)。除了使用传统 CNN 提取局部特征外，WiCoNet 还具有额外的上下文分支来聚合来自更大图像区域的信息。此外，我们引入了上下文转换器来嵌入来自上下文分支的上下文信息，并有选择地将其投影到局部特征上。 Context Transformer 扩展了 Vision Transformer（一种新兴的神经网络）来对双分支语义相关性进行建模。它克服了 CNN 的局部性限制，使 WiCoNet 在分割土地覆盖/土地利用 (LCLU) 类别之前能够看到更大的图景。在几个基准数据集上进行的消融研究和比较实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。此外，我们还提供了一个新的北京土地利用（BLU）数据集。这是一个大规模的HR卫星数据集，具有高质量、细粒度的参考标签，可以促进该领域的未来研究。 本文提出一种基于宽上下文变换器（WiCoNet）的高分辨率遥感图像语义分割方法，通过结合局部特征和全局上下文信息提升分割效果。 Lei Ding,Dong Lin,Shaofu Lin,Jing Zhang,Xiaojie Cui,Yuebin Wang,Hao Tang,Lorenzo Bruzzone cs.CV

authors_text: Liming Wu,Shuo Han,Alain Chen,Paul Salama,Kenneth W. Dunn,Edward J. Delp
title: RCNN-SliceNet: A Slice and Cluster Approach for Nuclei Centroid Detection in Three-Dimensional Fluorescence Microscopy Images
title_zh: RCNN-SliceNet：三维荧光显微镜图像中原子核质心检测的切片和聚类方法
abstract: Robust and accurate nuclei centroid detection is important for the understanding of biological structures in fluorescence microscopy images. Existing automated nuclei localization methods face three main challenges: (1) Most of object detection methods work only on 2D images and are difficult to extend to 3D volumes; (2) Segmentation-based models can be used on 3D volumes but it is computational expensive for large microscopy volumes and they have difficulty distinguishing different instances of objects; (3) Hand annotated ground truth is limited for 3D microscopy volumes. To address these issues, we present a scalable approach for nuclei centroid detection of 3D microscopy volumes. We describe the RCNN-SliceNet to detect 2D nuclei centroids for each slice of the volume from different directions and 3D agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) is used to estimate the 3D centroids of nuclei in a volume. The model was trained with the synthetic microscopy data generated using Spatially Constrained Cycle-Consistent Adversarial Networks (SpCycleGAN) and tested on different types of real 3D microscopy data. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can accurately count and detect the nuclei centroids in a 3D microscopy volume.

Existing automated nuclei localization methods face three main challenges: (1) Most of object detection methods work only on 2D images and are difficult to extend to 3D volumes; (2) Segmentation-based models can be used on 3D volumes but it is computational expensive for large microscopy volumes and they have difficulty distinguishing different instances of objects; (3) Hand annotated ground truth is limited for 3D microscopy volumes. To address these issues, we present a scalable approach for nuclei centroid detection of 3D microscopy volumes. We describe the RCNN-SliceNet to detect 2D nuclei centroids for each slice of the volume from different directions and 3D agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) is used to estimate the 3D centroids of nuclei in a volume. The model was trained with the synthetic microscopy data generated using Spatially Constrained Cycle-Consistent Adversarial Networks (SpCycleGAN) and tested on different types of real 3D microscopy data. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can accurately count and detect the nuclei centroids in a 3D microscopy volume.
abstract_zh: 稳健而准确的核质心检测对于理解荧光显微镜图像中的生物结构非常重要。现有的自动核定位方法面临三个主要挑战：（1）大多数目标检测方法仅适用于 2D 图像，难以扩展到 3D 体积； (2) 基于分割的模型可用于 3D 体积，但对于大型显微镜体积来说计算成本高昂，并且难以区分对象的不同实例； (3) 手工注释的真实情况仅限于 3D 显微镜体积。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种可扩展的 3D 显微镜体积核质心检测方法。我们描述了 RCNN-SliceNet 来从不同方向检测体积每个切片的 2D 核质心，并使用 3D 凝聚层次聚类（AHC）来估计体积中核的 3D 质心。该模型使用空间约束循环一致对抗网络 (SpCycleGAN) 生成的合成显微镜数据进行训练，并在不同类型的真实 3D 显微镜数据上进行测试。大量实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以准确计数和检测 3D 显微镜体积中的核质心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RCNN-SliceNet方法，通过结合2D切片检测与3D聚类技术，解决三维荧光显微图像中细胞核质心检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在三维显微图像中面临2D检测扩展困难、分割模型计算成本高及真实标注数据不足三大挑战，需开发更高效准确的检测方案。
AI.method: 采用RCNN-SliceNet检测各方向切片的2D质心，结合3D层次聚类算法整合结果；利用SpCycleGAN生成合成数据进行模型训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能准确计数并检测多种真实三维显微数据中的细胞核质心，验证了方法的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过切片检测与聚类融合的创新架构，有效克服三维核检测难题，为生物医学图像分析提供新思路。
